issues.description: Condition missing: Must check if opponent has more DON!! cards than you. Current condition is 'Always', should be a comparison condition checking opponent DON count vs your DON count.
Target scope incorrect: 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' should specify 'up to 1' as per card text. Should be ChooseOpponentCharacter with maxTargets:1 or similar qualifier.
Duration incorrect: Card says 'during this turn' which means the effect applies only during your attack turn. Should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.
